response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and demonstrated technical depth across languages and systems, including some AI-agent infrastructure work; however, he lacks clear evidence of 15 years in cloud/AI-specific engineering leadership, has no advanced degree in AI, and his AI experience is tangential rather than core or product-driven.
strengths: Proven entrepreneurial spirit with long-running open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Extensive full-stack and systems-level experience across languages (DLang, TypeScript, C++, Node.js)
Strong track record of technical leadership, tooling development, and knowledge sharing via workshops
concerns: No demonstrable AI product or platform built from scratch with ML/AI at its core
Lacks clear evidence of 15 years focused on cloud or AI infrastructure engineering
No advanced degree in AI or related field; AI experience is incidental, not strategic
